page: Amazon Web Services i8g.metal-24xl is a storage-optimized bare-metal server powered by AWS Graviton processors. The system features 96 dedicated physical cores utilizing the arm64 Neoverse-V2 architecture running at 2.8 GHz, with one thread per core. It is equipped with 768.0 GB of DDR5 memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core, and includes 22,500 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Network connectivity is supported by a 56 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

In benchmark evaluations, the server demonstrates top-tier multi-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth. Uncached large-block read operations reach 481.52 GB/sec, while write operations achieve 218.23 GB/sec. Database operations and Redis SET operations both rank in the top 10% of performance, with Redis handling 197.01 million operations per second. Multi-threaded decompression and static web serving throughput also place in the top tier, whereas single-core performance and text generation for small language models represent moderate to weak performance tiers.

The hardware configuration offers high resource density, combining high-capacity DDR5 memory with massive local NVMe storage. This profile delivers qualitative cost efficiency for data-intensive deployments by reducing the need for external storage attachments. The server is suited for high-throughput database systems, large-scale Redis deployments, static web serving, and multi-threaded data processing workloads.
description: Amazon Web Services i8g.metal-24xl is a storage-optimized bare-metal server designed for data-intensive workloads. It features 96 dedicated arm64 physical cores powered by AWS Graviton Neoverse-V2 processors running at 2.8 GHz, paired with 768.0 GB of DDR5 memory and 22,500 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. The server delivers 56 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. In benchmark testing, the i8g.metal-24xl exhibits top-tier multi-core CPU performance, exceptional memory bandwidth, and superior database processing capabilities, including 197.01 million Redis SET operations per second. While single-core speeds are moderate, its massive parallel processing capacity and high-speed local storage provide excellent resource density and qualitative cost efficiency for large-scale deployments. This bare-metal instance is highly suited for high-throughput databases, Redis caching layers, static web serving, and intensive multi-threaded data processing applications.
og_description: Amazon Web Services i8g.metal-24xl is a storage-optimized bare-metal server featuring 96 arm64 Graviton cores, 768 GB DDR5 RAM, and 22.5 TB of local NVMe SSD storage for high-throughput database workloads.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services i8g.metal-24xl is a bare-metal server with 96 Graviton cores, 768 GB DDR5 RAM, and 22.5 TB NVMe SSD storage.
tagline: A high-density bare-metal platform combining ninety-six dedicated arm64 cores with twenty-two terabytes of high-speed local NVMe storage.
bullet_points: 96 dedicated arm64 AWS Graviton Neoverse-V2 physical cores at 2.8 GHz
22,500 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier multi-core CPU, database, and Redis performance
Optimized for high-throughput databases and large-scale caching
